---
title: 'Word of the Lord "Promotion" 05/01'
date: '2013-05-04T03:26:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4886680707098469474'
blogger_filename: '/2013/05/word-of-lord-promotion-0501.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Answers'
---

<br />
<div class="MsoPlainText">
God: Your promotion to leadership in the natural will be
matched by your promotion in the Spirit. You will now see rapid growth
throughout this year and beyond.&nbsp;Wed 5/1/2013 6:08 AM<o:p></o:p></div>
